commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Enhance ManagerBadgesPointsScreen: Integrate new badge category detail screen, implement badge category migration logic, and update badge categorization for improved user experience and consistency across the application.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor BadgePointsScreen: Remove level-up animation logic and related state management for a cleaner implementation. Update BadgeCategoryDetailScreen: Introduce category-specific accent colors for improved UI consistency.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Add Firestore connection error handling to BadgeCategoryDetailScreen, including a user-friendly fallback state and reload option.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Refactor BadgeGrid layout to be responsive based on screen width, adjusting grid item count and aspect ratio for improved display on various devices.

commits.author: Thembelihle
commits.message: Feature - Add back navigation button to Badge Category Detail screen for improved user experience.
